title: GitLab security advisory (AV26-588)
description: On June 10, 2026, GitLab published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitLab Community Edition (CE)  versions prior to 19.0.2, 18.11.5 and 18.10.8
GitLab Enterprise Edition (EE)  versions prior to 19.0.2, 18.11.5 and 18.10.8
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
